seo.title: Installment vs cash: simulate which option is best | Auraxis
seo.description: Compare upfront and installment payment considering discount, inflation, opportunity cost and extra fees. Find out which option is financially better.
seo.ogTitle: Installment vs cash: find the best option | Auraxis
seo.ogDescription: Auraxis public tool to compare upfront and installment payments with transparent assumptions and reliable results.

faq.q1: When is it worth paying in installments?
faq.a1: When the present value of the installment plan falls below the cash price given the opportunity rate, inflation and extra fees you entered.
faq.a2: Not always. If there is a relevant cash discount or extra fees, a single payment may still be the better financial choice.

hero.title: Discover which payment method is financially better
hero.subtitle: Auraxis compares cash price, installments, opportunity cost, inflation and extra fees to give you a clear and auditable recommendation.
hero.featureBasicDesc: Get a direct verdict in seconds without needing to understand financial math.
hero.featureAdvancedDesc: We expand the explanation with a schedule, present value, break-even and the assumptions used.

seoSection.considersDesc: Cash discount, installments, opportunity cost, inflation and upfront extra fees.
seoSection.notReplaces: What this page does not replace
seoSection.notReplacesDesc: This is an educational simulation based on the assumptions you entered. It does not replace an official commercial proposal, contract or financial advice.
seoSection.howToUse: How to get the most out of it
seoSection.howToUseDesc: Test the same item with and without a cash discount, with different installment counts and more conservative rates. This helps you understand the sensitivity of the decision.
